zh.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wilford於大約1366年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，他的父親Robert Wilford28歲，母親Elizabeth23歲。他於1404年之後與Margaret Cornu在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1401年被列為mayor of exeter。他去世於1413年7月19日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wilford于大约1366年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，他的父亲Robert Wilford28岁，母亲Elizabeth23岁。他于1404年之后与Margaret Cornu在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1401年被列为mayor of exeter。他去世于1413年7月19日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Wilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): habitational name from either of two places called Wilford, in Nottinghamshire and Suffolk, both probably named with an Old English wilig ‘willow tree’ + Old English ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Wilfert
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wolf ‘wolf’ + hart ‘hardy, brave’, ‘strong’.
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements willio ‘will, wish’ + fridu ‘peace’.

variants.name: Willford
meanings: English (East Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Rutland, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Wilford  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wilford was born about 1366, in Exeter, Devon, England, his father, Robert Wilford, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 23. He married Margaret Cornu after 1404, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1401, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as mayor of exeter. He died before 19 July 1413, in his hometown, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wilford est né environ 1366, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert Wilford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cornu après 1404, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1401, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mayor of exeter. Il est décédé avant 19 juillet 1413, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wilford um 1366 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Wilford 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 23. Er hat nach 1404 in Devon, England Margaret Cornu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1401, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mayor of exeter aufgeführt. Er starb vor 19. Juli 1413 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wilford è nato il circa 1366 nel Exeter, Devon, England, il suo padre, Robert Wilford, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Cornu dopo il 1404, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1401, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mayor of exeter. Morì prima del 19 luglio 1413, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスデボンエクセター
ja.Exeter, Devon, England: イギリスデボンエクセター
ja.lifeSummary: William Wilfordが約1366年にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父Robert Wilfordは28歳，母Elizabethは23歳であった。1404年以後にイギリスデボンでMargaret Cornuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1401年，36歳の時，職業はmayor of exeterと記録されている。彼は1413年7月19日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wilford(이)가 대략 1366년 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Wilford(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1404년 이후 영국 데폰에서 Margaret Cornu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1401년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 mayor of exeter이었다. 그는 1413년 7월 19일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1366–before 19 July 1413: ойролцоогоор 1366 он–1413 оны Долоодугаар сарын 19–наас өмнө
mn.Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom: Exeter, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wilford nasceu aproximadamente 1366, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Wilford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cornu após 1404, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1401, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como mayor of exeter. Ele faleceu antes 19 de julho de 1413, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wilford родился около 1366 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Wilford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cornu после 1404 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1401 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  он работал по профессии mayor of exeter. Он умер перед 19 июля 1413 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

sm.about 1366–before 19 July 1413: e tusa o le 1366–a'e le'I oo le 19 Iulai 1413

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wilford nació aproximadamente 1366, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Wilford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Cornu después de 1404, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1401, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era mayor of exeter. Murió antes de 19 de julio de 1413, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
